query:
UPDATE establishments 
SET categoryId = 17 
WHERE categoryId = 2 
  AND source = 'spreadsheet'
  AND (name LIKE '%sushi%' OR name LIKE '%Sushi%' OR name LIKE '%SUSHI%'
    OR name LIKE '%ramen%' OR name LIKE '%Ramen%'
    OR name LIKE '%temaki%' OR name LIKE '%Temaki%'
    OR name LIKE '%yakissoba%' OR name LIKE '%Yakissoba%'
    OR name LIKE '%sashimi%' OR name LIKE '%Sashimi%'
    OR name LIKE '%trattoria%' OR name LIKE '%Trattoria%'
    OR name LIKE '%osteria%' OR name LIKE '%Osteria%'
    OR name LIKE '%mexicano%' OR name LIKE '%Mexicano%' OR name LIKE '%mexicana%' OR name LIKE '%Mexicana%'
    OR name LIKE '%taco%' OR name LIKE '%Taco%' OR name LIKE '%burrito%' OR name LIKE '%Burrito%'
    OR name LIKE '%árabe%' OR name LIKE '%Árabe%'
    OR name LIKE '%kebab%' OR name LIKE '%Kebab%'
    OR name LIKE '%shawarma%' OR name LIKE '%Shawarma%'
    OR name LIKE '%esfiha%' OR name LIKE '%Esfiha%'
    OR name LIKE '%indiano%' OR name LIKE '%Indiano%' OR name LIKE '%indiana%' OR name LIKE '%Indiana%'
    OR name LIKE '%chinês%' OR name LIKE '%Chinês%' OR name LIKE '%chinesa%' OR name LIKE '%Chinesa%'
    OR name LIKE '%thai%' OR name LIKE '%Thai%' OR name LIKE '%tailand%' OR name LIKE '%Tailand%'
    OR name LIKE '%peruan%' OR name LIKE '%Peruan%'
    OR name LIKE '%ceviche%' OR name LIKE '%Ceviche%'
    OR name LIKE '%bistro%' OR name LIKE '%Bistro%' OR name LIKE '%bistrô%' OR name LIKE '%Bistrô%'
    OR name LIKE '%korean%' OR name LIKE '%Korean%' OR name LIKE '%coreano%' OR name LIKE '%Coreano%'
    OR name LIKE '%grego%' OR name LIKE '%Grego%' OR name LIKE '%grega%');
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4LUtXE4vPqQU3CD.root --database WG3U3sVg2ZrW6m8T99FRdE --execute UPDATE establishments 
SET categoryId = 17 
WHERE categoryId = 2 
  AND source = 'spreadsheet'
  AND (name LIKE '%sushi%' OR name LIKE '%Sushi%' OR name LIKE '%SUSHI%'
    OR name LIKE '%ramen%' OR name LIKE '%Ramen%'
    OR name LIKE '%temaki%' OR name LIKE '%Temaki%'
    OR name LIKE '%yakissoba%' OR name LIKE '%Yakissoba%'
    OR name LIKE '%sashimi%' OR name LIKE '%Sashimi%'
    OR name LIKE '%trattoria%' OR name LIKE '%Trattoria%'
    OR name LIKE '%osteria%' OR name LIKE '%Osteria%'
    OR name LIKE '%mexicano%' OR name LIKE '%Mexicano%' OR name LIKE '%mexicana%' OR name LIKE '%Mexicana%'
    OR name LIKE '%taco%' OR name LIKE '%Taco%' OR name LIKE '%burrito%' OR name LIKE '%Burrito%'
    OR name LIKE '%árabe%' OR name LIKE '%Árabe%'
    OR name LIKE '%kebab%' OR name LIKE '%Kebab%'
    OR name LIKE '%shawarma%' OR name LIKE '%Shawarma%'
    OR name LIKE '%esfiha%' OR name LIKE '%Esfiha%'
    OR name LIKE '%indiano%' OR name LIKE '%Indiano%' OR name LIKE '%indiana%' OR name LIKE '%Indiana%'
    OR name LIKE '%chinês%' OR name LIKE '%Chinês%' OR name LIKE '%chinesa%' OR name LIKE '%Chinesa%'
    OR name LIKE '%thai%' OR name LIKE '%Thai%' OR name LIKE '%tailand%' OR name LIKE '%Tailand%'
    OR name LIKE '%peruan%' OR name LIKE '%Peruan%'
    OR name LIKE '%ceviche%' OR name LIKE '%Ceviche%'
